message:
fix(core): resolve clippy warnings in fleet_scrollback_coordinator

- Rename tuple bindings (pages→evicted_pages, bytes→freed_bytes,
  targets→applied) to avoid similar_names lint with panes parameter
- Generalize HashMap impl of PaneScrollbackAccess over BuildHasher
  to satisfy implicit_hasher lint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
